name: CMPLX-MORSR
expanded_name: CMPLX Middle-Out Resonance and Shape Reader
purpose: Provide the CMPLX-side MORSR umbrella for centroid-origin 240-direction E8 pulse diagnostics with hidden-result honesty ablation.

canonical_loop.activation: trigger all instant active nodes touched by the pulse
canonical_loop.confirmation: one confirmed reading sets a pode/node
canonical_loop.result: quadratically confirmed extension of the first centroid

required_honesty_layer.name: Hidden Guess Result
required_honesty_layer.rule: The system must predict or choose before expected result, oracle label, or diagnostic answer is revealed.

required_cqe_layer.rule: Every CMPLX-MORSR event maps engine behavior to math/formal structure to product surface to library binding before creating a new datum.

required_universal_adapters.rule: All handshakes and networking bind through BBA plus Universal Adapter Programs before custom protocol work.
